description_short: 1166 FCU is a regional credit union serving Southern New Jersey, Southeastern Pennsylvania, and Northern Delaware since 1936, offering auto loans, home equity loans, and deposit products.
description_long:
1166 Federal Credit Union was founded in 1936 to serve Mobil research employees and has operated for 90 years as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution. In 2024, the credit union completed a recharter that expanded its membership eligibility beyond its original employer base to serve the broader tri-state region, now targeting the 1.5 million unbanked and underbanked individuals in Southern New Jersey, Southeastern Pennsylvania, and Northern Delaware.

1166 FCU offers a range of consumer and business financial products. On the lending side, they provide auto loans (36-84 months for new and used vehicles), home equity loans (5, 7, 10, or 15-year fixed terms with no upfront application fee), and credit card services. On the deposit side, they recently launched a Money Market Plus account offering 3.00% APY with a $2,500 minimum deposit and 2 free withdrawals monthly. Members also gain access to over 5,000 shared branches nationwide and free financial counseling.

The credit union distinguishes itself through competitive regional rates, direct partnerships with local employers (Select Employer Groups), and consumer benefits like a $500 discount at Spirit Auto Centers. Their 2024 recharter represents a significant shift toward community banking accessibility, moving from a narrower employer-focused model to broader regional membership. Their 90-year track record and NCUA federal insurance provide stability and consumer protection.

The primary limitation is geographic reach—membership is restricted to residents and workers in a three-state region (Southern NJ, Southeastern PA, Northern DE). Additionally, while their Money Market Plus account offers competitive rates, the current rate environment means this may not remain highly competitive long-term. Their website does not prominently display credit card APRs, business loan details, or comprehensive rate comparisons, making full product evaluation difficult for prospective members.
services: Auto loans (36-84 months for new cars, used cars, trucks, SUVs, vans)
Home equity loans (5, 7, 10, 15-year fixed terms, no upfront application fee)
Money Market Plus savings account (3.00% APY, $2,500 minimum)
Select Employer Group (SEG) partnerships with employer discounts
pros: Competitive auto loan rates (36-84 month terms available, with comparison rates published on website)
No upfront application fee for home equity loans with fixed rates and terms
Recently launched Money Market Plus account at 3.00% APY (higher than many regional banks)
Access to 5,000+ shared branches nationwide despite regional membership base
Free financial counseling included with membership
Local partnership benefits (e.g., $500 discount at Spirit Auto Centers in Swedesboro)
NCUA federal insurance on deposits provides same protection as FDIC-insured banks
cons: Membership restricted to three-state region (Southern NJ, Southeastern PA, Northern Delaware)—not nationally accessible
Website lacks specific credit card APR ranges and detailed business loan product information
Money Market Plus requires $2,500 minimum deposit, which may be high for some consumers
Limited transparency on auto loan and home equity loan APR ranges on primary website
Smaller institution with fewer branches than major national credit unions
best_for: Residents in Southern New Jersey, Southeastern Pennsylvania, or Northern Delaware seeking competitive auto financing
Homeowners in the tri-state region interested in fixed-rate home equity loans without application fees
Employees of Select Employer Group companies partnered with 1166 FCU receiving additional discounts
Savers looking for higher-yield deposit products with flexible access (Money Market Plus account holders)
diagnosis: 1166 FCU is best suited for tri-state region residents (Southern NJ, Southeastern PA, Northern Delaware) seeking competitively-priced auto or home equity loans with personalized local service and access to a national shared branch network. The primary caveat is strict geographic membership eligibility—if you live outside their service area, you cannot join, and the website does not clearly display all APR ranges, making rate comparison difficult before application.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: 1166 — Credit Union in Swedesboro, NJ | CreditDoc
meta_description: 1166 — NCUA-insured credit union in Swedesboro, NJ. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
